title: FROG Canonical Source Schema
description: Conservative machine-checkable structural schema for canonical .frog source. This artifact covers top-level canonical source shape, allowed top-level section vocabulary, required-versus-optional top-level sections, and section kind constraints only. It does not define full structural ownership for every section-local object, semantic validity, validated meaning, Execution IR, lowering, backend contract content, or runtime realization.
$comment: Normative ownership remains in Expression/ prose. This schema is a repository-visible machine-checkable aid for structural reproducibility and must not be treated as the owner of the language.

spec_version.description: Specification version identifier for the canonical source file.

metadata.description: Required metadata section. Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Metadata.md.

interface.description: Required interface section. Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Interface.md.

diagram.description: Required diagram section. Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Diagram.md.

connector.description: Optional connector section. Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Connector.md.

front_panel.description: Optional front_panel section. Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Front panel.md.

icon.description: Optional icon section. Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Icon.md.

ide.description: Optional ide section. Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/IDE preferences.md.

cache.description: Optional cache section. Section-local object structure is owned by Expression/Cache.md.
